text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yup, no doubt about it. The best Umamusume are
the cool ones!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: What nonsense. Obviously cuteness trumps coolness any day of the week!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What about that movie? "Three Furlongs of the
Heart," right? You were going on and on about
how cool the male lead was!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Well, what about you?! You said the heroine was so cute, you just had to cheer her on!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...You know what, let's just leave it at that.
